Claw Code

This installer sets up Claw Code for your Windows user account and adds a desktop shortcut to the Claw Launcher.

Installed files:
- claw.exe
- claw-launcher.exe
- .claw data and configuration

To start:
- Use the Claw Launcher shortcut on your desktop or in the Start menu.
- The launcher keeps the working directory aligned with the shortcut location.

If you want to remove Claw Code, use Apps & features or the uninstaller from the Start menu.
